questions.clue: Built to commemorate the defeat of the Tatars, St. Basil's Cathedral is in this capital city
In ancient Rome it was a temple to 12 gods; in the 600s it became a church to just one, holding the remains of martyrs
In 2023 16th St. Baptist in this city marks 150 years of  the congregation, a history marred by a 1963 bombing
Climbing up on Montmartre Hill, I could see Paris' city lights & this basilica whose name means sacred heart
Controlled by the Palestinian Authority, the Church of this is believed to mark the birthplace of Jesus in Bethlehem
About half the size of Earth, it has a 24.6-hour day
For 20 years in every 248, it's further from the Sun than Pluto
It was the first planet explored by a spacecraft, 1962's Mariner 2
Leda is one of its more than 50 named moons
It's surrounded by phenomena namedA, B, C, D, E, F & G
Born in Boston in 1890, she had 9 children, including John, Robert, Edward & Eunice
In 1986 she won an Emmy award for playing Rose Nylund on "The Golden Girls"
After appearing in the "Ziegfeld Follies", she starred in "Star and Garter"
Rose of Sharon is pregnant & subsequently abandoned by her spouse in California in this Steinbeck novel
D.C. socialite Rose O'Neal Greenhow sent word that Union troops were moving on Manassas, helping the Confederates before this battle
This Spanish word for father can also mean "cool!" when it comes after "que" in a phrase
In Venezuela enratonado, "moused", means you're in this condition after a night of too much rum & cocuy
Ay! Fans of Bart Simpson know this interjection is used to express surprise or dismay
Don't act too high & mighty in Mexico or you might be called a "fresa", which literally translates to this fruit
"The chabón abides" in Argentina, as el chabón is a local equivalent of this--it's also a nickname for Pope Francis
"O.M.I.T.B." is short for this, a show & the podcast within it
Season one of this series ended with the title teen sleuth solving the murder of her best friend Lilly Kane

[IMAGE CLUE]
(I'm Zoë Chao.) I just murdered it on Apple TV+ in "The Afterparty", or did I? Either way, my character of Zoe was a suspect as well as the ex-wife of Brett, played by this man who was a "Celebrity Jeopardy!" champion in 2022
Nicole Kidman played Celeste, whose abusive husband Perry was pushed to his death in this series based on a Liane Moriarty novel
On the BBC's "Sherlock", this acting pair are the modern day Holmes & Watson

categories.name: THE GREAT AMERICAN BAKING SHOW WITH ELLIE KEMPER

questions.clue:
[IMAGE CLUE]
(Ellie Kemper presents the clue.) Not surprisingly, our British judges, Prue Leith & Paul Hollywood, asked our bakers to prepare this meal, lighter than the high one, consisting of six Victoria sandwiches, six mini strawberry tarts, & six savory scones

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Ellie Kemper presents the clue.) For a signature challenge, our bakers had to come up with an elegant cake assembled from no less than 20 layers of these French pancakes

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Ellie Kemper presents the clue.) In one challenge, our bakers were asked to combine two classics--a chiffon cake with this citrus-based Florida dessert favorite

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Ellie Kemper presents the clue.) During Pastry Week, we asked our bakers to make a dozen of these south-of-the-border treats made with a choux pastry & filled with a yummy chocolate ganache

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Ellie Kemper presents the clue.) Our bakers made this sweet yeast bread that's braided & baked in a loaf pan &, as my cohost Zach explained, takes its name from the Polish word for "grandmother"

final.clue: An MLB team got this name in 1902 after some of its players defected to a new crosstown rival, leaving young replacements
